title: Reconcile docs, generated views, and rebuilt binary for Phase 8
description: Close the gap between the completed ledger and stale human-facing documentation. Regenerate reports/views, make the roadmap and README agree with completed Phase 6/7 work, rebuild the compiled binary, and smoke-test the resulting CLI before other Phase 8 work branches from it.
acceptance: docs/roadmap.md marks Phase 6 and Phase 7 as complete and describes the Phase 8 plan.
README does not contradict the current CLI/dashboard/git/Graphify/GitHub behavior.
Generated reports/context/task views are refreshed from the current ledger.
waystation.exe is rebuilt from src/cli/index.ts and responds to --version.
bun test, typecheck, biome check, waystation validate, and binary smoke checks are clean.
notes: This is the Phase 8 kickoff task and should be finished before implementation tasks branch out. Keep generated Markdown generated; do not hand-edit generated reports or task views.
